calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-10-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Joe Vickstein. Petitioner Dana Elizabeth Leone was sworn and examined. The Court grants the Decree changing Petitioner's name to Dana Elizabeth Elliott. Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Reset To Jun-02-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on a regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patty Dowling.
Jennifer Rice, Esq. represented plaintiff, Dana Leone, who is not present.
The Court ordered plaintiff to be present at the hearing, the matter continued to June 6, 2003 at 9:00 am.
